subject: iter 101 — 3-lane quantum-tools review (snap-emu + kernel-apk + sinister-os) — Sanctum integrate per-lane plans

Real-QPU at K=4/1024shots noise-floored on all 3 — sim-recipe is sim-only validated. standing_finding_blocks: Real WK_C180 at K=4/1024shots is noise-floored on all 3 triads tested. The 25-35pp recipe is sim-only validated. Recipe upgrade paths: K=8 (17q SWAP), 4096+ shots, or error mitigation.

Wall-cost vs operator-intent gap: 'N seconds of quantum' wall-translates to ~5x larger budget than pulse-time.
